# Sample Prompt

Note: This is just a sample prompt. There were further prompts to adjust the outcome, before and anfter this prompt.

```json
{
  "image_description": "A high-detail full-body anime splash art, in the distinct visual style of image_0.png, of the genius software engineer and his mechanical wolf companion, centralized in a wide 16:9 cinematic frame against a completely white background. The composition and key elements (character, hovering keyboards, complex holographic screens, data smoke, code shards, and explosive embers) are arranged exactly as in image_0.png. The character maintains the focused expression, pose, and specific outfit from image_0.png. The mechanical wolf is positioned at his lower right, in the exact aggressive, low-prowl stance and placement seen in image_0.png, but its body and armor design are strictly those of the mechanical geometric wolf from image_1.png, featuring an angular panel structure and extensive integrated printed circuit board patterns with node points. The wolf's eyes and internal circuitry lines glow with a vibrant, pulsing Neon Cyan. The entire scene, including all floating screens, text (identical code syntax and 'ERROR_COMPILING'), keyboards, and debris, is rendered against a solid, clean, completely white background.",

    "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
    "framing": "A full-body shot of both characters and all surrounding elements, with generous negative space on the left and right, ensuring no limbs, tail, or equipment are cut off by the edges.",
    "positioning": "Perfectly centralized dual-character composition, precisely replicating the arrangement of image_0.png."
  },

    "syntax_language": "Python/C++ hybrid",

      "if firewall.breached(): wolf.engage_defense_protocol()",
      "os.kernel.patch_vulnerability(addr=0x7FFD, payload=logic_gate)",
      "01100111 01100101 01101110 01101001 01110101 01110011"

    "outfit": "Techno-organic techwear, black oversized hoodie with gold accents, a high-collared open tech-jacket with a tan interior lining, fingerless haptic-feedback gloves, as detailed in image_0.png.",
    "equipment": "The sleek, hovering mechanical split-keyboard and the exact array of holographic translucent monitors surrounding him from image_0.png, including all screen content."

    "pose": "Replicate the specific floating, mid-air 'hacking' pose from image_0.png, with arms positioned exactly to interact with the hovering holographic screens and keyboard.",
    "torso": "Slightly twisted toward the viewer, showcasing a three-quarter view amidst floating data windows, as in image_0.png",
    "arms": "Right arm extended forward to 'swipe' a digital terminal, left arm pulled back near the chest controlling a holographic scroll, as in image_0.png."

  "composition_and_style": {
    "art_style": "Modern gacha game splash art, precise cel-shading, clean line work, adhering to the high-detail art style of image_0.png.",
```
